title: Travel NapPack
description: Adds craftable sleeping bags made from two carpets. They let you sleep through the night even with monsters nearby, but they don’t set a spawnpoint.
body:
Adds craftable sleeping bags made from one white carpet plus a second carpet of any color. They work like beds placed directly on the ground, letting you skip the night without the “you can’t sleep, monsters are nearby” message. Sleeping bags do not set a spawnpoint; only beds keep that function.
